heading: Biennial report
label: 31g Biennial report
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 31g, , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , directed the Secretary to submit a biennial report to Congress describing the status of the nationwide geologic mapping program and evaluating the progress achieved during the preceding fiscal year in developing the national geologic-map data base, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. children.text: describes the status of the national geologic mapping program;
describes and evaluates the progress achieved during the preceding 2 years in developing the national geologic map database; and
includes any recommendations that the Secretary may have for legislative or other action to achieve the purposes of sections 31c through 31f of this title.
